Current time: Saturday, May 9th, 2026 — 4:47 PM (America/Chicago)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.text: Good — 24 changed files, mostly PID files and state files. Let me check the .gitignore change and see if we should add PID files to it to avoid noise, then stage and commit everything.

diff --git a/.gitignore b/.gitignore
index 8057dbbc55..aadb836388 100644
--- a/.gitignore
+++ b/.gitignore
@@ -55,3 +55,4 @@ archive/
 apps/macos/.build/
 ---.git-rewrite/
 ---apps/macos/.build/
+.venv/

content.text: PID files aren't in .gitignore — they're runtime state that changes constantly. Let me add them to .gitignore to keep the repo clean, then stage and commit.
